tasks.title: 我的學習－學習日曆日期錯誤
tasks.rootCause: mock-data.js's calendar.monthLabel was hardcoded to "2024 年 5 月", with all grid values hand-filled to match that fixed month.
tasks.fix: computeCalendarModel(viewYear, viewMonth) computes monthLabel/firstWeekday/daysInMonth/today from a real Date() every time; calendar() is now stateful with real 上一月/下一月/今日 navigation and real per-day activity from AHS.MaterialRuntime.

tasks.title: Learning Center Runtime Integration
tasks.summary: All interactive elements audited against the 3-state rule (① real Runtime ② Disabled+reason ③ Coming Soon). Real Runtime wiring added where a genuine data source exists (學習記錄-本週, 週報告, 學習日曆, 科目進度, 學習總覽). Coming Soon/Disabled applied honestly where no Runtime exists anywhere in the repo (本月/今年/全部 tabs, 成就徽章's 分享/查看全部, 週報告/科目進度's 查看全部).

regression.result: PASS — 0 console errors across all 9 pages, all prior-round fixes re-verified unaffected

sprintClosure.status: Runtime QA officially closed pending PMO confirmation

nextSteps: Awaiting GPT PMO final confirmation of Sprint 6.6 LOCK
